description.value: Power and glory of Rome; well-trained soldier in legions drilling and guarding borders. Centurion commands ~100 men; Legionary is rank and file.

contacts.value: Publicans, civilian suppliers, public officials, archers, cavalry, charioteers (military), slingers

coc7-cthulhu-invictus.specialNotes: Investigators should review Chapter Ten: The Roman Legions. May start with Fighting (Siege Bows) 0% or Fighting (Siege Launchers) 0% with Keeper permission.
